meaning: n.便道,绕路vi.绕路而行vt.使绕道
examples: He was happy to make a detour for her convenience.
We had to make a detour around the flooded fields.
It's well worth making a detour to see the village.
Take a quick detour up Preble St and onto Portland Sq to Walter's (2 Portland Sq).
From here, many veer from the official route and take a 25km detour to Moncton.
